reviews.comment:
si pasas a comprar algo por el ypf la cafeteria  que tienen ahi abajo y despues  vas al baño te persiguen los de seguridad como si uno fuera un ladron o nose que y te tocan la puerta , yo soy socio del A.C.A y solo voy a  hacer pis , a ver si se hacen algo con esa gente que toman porque no son las formas.

(Translated by Google)
If you go to the YPF to buy something, the cafeteria they have down there, and then you go to the bathroom, the security guards chase you like you're a thief or something, and they knock on the door. I'm a member of the A.C.A. and I only go to pee. Let's see if they do something about those people who take advantage of the situation because that's not the way to do things.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNZalA3Y1p3EAE

reviews.comment:
100% recomendable. 10 puntos la atención de Lucas Silva para el service de la camioneta en boxes. Sería bueno que agreguen las 6 cuotas sin interés que tienen otras YPF.

(Translated by Google)
100% recommended. Lucas Silva's service for the truck repair in the pits was excellent. It would be great if they added the 6 interest-free installments that other YPF stations offer.

Excelente la atención, la ambientación y la gastronomía.
Bajen los precios!!!

reviews.comment:
Es una estación de servicio muy moderna, te atiendien bien y hay seguridad
No se valores, pero tenían mucha variedad
Los baños limpios!

(Translated by Google)
It's a very modern gas station, they serve you well, and there's security.
I don't know the prices, but they had a lot of variety.
The bathrooms were clean!

reviews.comment:
Deberían respetar más al socio en cuanto a poder estacionar el socio con prioridad y el uso del baño lo mismo.Falta control.En un inicio estaban muy bien ahora aflojaron

(Translated by Google)
They should respect members more in terms of allowing them to park with priority and using the bathroom as well. There's a lack of control. At first they were very good, now they've slacked off.
